title: Scaphosepalum amethystinum
taxonomy: Scaphosepalum amethystinum is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This epiphytic orchid is native to the tropical regions of Central America. The genus Scaphosepalum is a small group of orchids that are closely related to the genus Pleurothallis. They are characterized by their small, often delicate flowers and unique growth habits. Scaphosepalum amethystinum, in particular, is known for its vibrant purple flowers and slender stems.

The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it beneficial for wound healing and skin conditions such as acne and eczema.
